title: citrus × sinensis subsp. fetifera
intro: Citrus × sinensis subsp. fetifera, also known as the Yuzu or Citrus junos, is a species of citrus fruit native to East Asia, specifically in China, Korea, and Japan. The medicinal properties of Citrus × sinensis subsp. fetifera include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, aid in digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and protect against chronic diseases. Citrus × sinensis subsp. fetifera can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and supplements, which are used to promote overall well-being and prevent illness.
